cs.page_title: Velor Construction | Industrial Halls & General Contracting
cs.meta_description: Velor Construction — industrial halls, general contracting and Holz100 solid wood construction. European standards, Polish execution.
cs.hero_p: Generální dodávky průmyslových hal, skladů a technologických instalací. Inženýrská přesnost, nekompromisní kvalita. Komunikace: PL · EN · DE · FR · RU · UA
cs.trust_1: ✓ Experience from projects in Germany, Norway and Poland
cs.pillar_1_p: Experience from Scandinavian and German markets allows us to execute the most complex steel and concrete structures in accordance with Eurocodes.
cs.pillar_2_p: We don't just build walls. We design and implement advanced industrial installations, HVAC, and Building Management Systems (BMS).
cs.pillar_3_p: We take full responsibility for the construction process. From building permits to structural assembly and final acceptance.
cs.service_1_p: Design and assembly of steel structures. Comprehensive construction of large-scale facilities, logistics and production centers.
cs.service_2_p: Execution of advanced HVAC systems, high-power electrical installations, sanitary networks and fire protection systems.
cs.service_3_p: Comprehensive project delivery in the 'Design & Build' system. Full technical consultancy and investment cost optimization.
cs.service_4_p: Professional construction management, investor supervision, cost and schedule control using modern IT tools. Daily progress reports for the investor — a standard for every project.
cs.service_5_p: We implement facilities in the Austrian Holz100 technology: walls made of 100% solid wood, connected with beech dowels — without glue, metal or building chemicals.
cs.holz_lead: Alongside steel structures, we are developing a second pillar: solid wood construction in the Holz100 system — one of the purest wood technologies in Europe.
cs.holz_f1_p: Solid wood layers connected exclusively by dried beech dowels, which lock the structure permanently after absorbing ambient moisture.
cs.holz_f2_p: Diffusively open partitions naturally regulate indoor humidity and temperature all year round.
cs.holz_f3_p: Massive solid wood partitions achieve high fire resistance classes and excellent thermal accumulation.
cs.holz_f4_p: Every building binds carbon dioxide for decades — an ESG argument that every institutional investor values today.
cs.cases_lead: Projects completed by our team members within the structures of leading general contractors in Poland, Germany, and Norway.
cs.case_1_challenge_p: Comprehensive realization for a premium car dealer — parallel work of multiple trades and subcontractors on one site.
cs.case_1_solution_p: Coordination of subcontractors and in-house crews: steel structure, full electrical and sanitary installation, floor insulation, partitions, joinery, fire doors, tiling, earthworks, paving, screeds.
cs.case_1_result_p: Facility brought from shell state to handover — a scope identical to Velor's current general contracting offer.
cs.case_2_challenge_p: Track extension in an active port terminal — conflicts with existing infrastructure and ongoing operator logistics.
cs.case_2_solution_p: Demolition of existing infrastructure, earthworks and drainage, construction of new track layout coordinated with terminal operations.
cs.case_2_result_p: New track integrated with the existing layout without halting port operations.
cs.case_3_challenge_p: Realization of a complex glass-aluminum facade and high-end office fit-out in Norway's largest media hub.
cs.case_3_solution_p: Just-in-Time delivery management in dense urban areas and coordination of finishing works for TV broadcasters.
cs.case_3_result_p: Prestigious project serving as a quality benchmark in the Scandinavian market.
cs.p1_pl: Garwolin — complete electrical installation for a new KFC facility.
cs.p2_pl: Warsaw, Stromboli estate — replacement of 144 heat and water meters.
cs.p3_pl: Warsaw, Rose Estate — garage ventilation and fire protection renovation.
cs.p4_pl: Warsaw — garage lighting modernization: motion sensors, switchboards.
cs.p5_pl: Warsaw — kindergarten: classroom renovation and landscaping.
cs.p6_pl: Pruszków and Warsaw — residential: door portals and wood finishings.
cs.p7_pl: Mazowsze — single-family house: earthworks, reinforcement, formwork, concreting.
cs.p1_de: Sande k. Wilhelmshaven — PV farm: panel and fence assembly.
cs.p4_de: Magdeburg, Hasselbachplatz — tram track junction renovation.
cs.p5_de: Heeslingen — railway line renovation (4 km) with millimetre-tolerance track installation and traffic management.
cs.p1_no: Strusshamn, Kleppestø — waterproofing and plasterboard partitions.
cs.p2_no: Bergen, Lille Gartnerløkken — residential complex: prefab walls, wooden roof, facade.
cs.p3_no: Bergen, Steinkjellergaten — staircase and basement fire protection upgrade.
cs.p4_no: Bergen Region — greenhouse assembly 7.8 × 12.8 m from foundations to roof.
cs.step_1_p: We analyze operational needs and planning conditions to select optimal structural solutions.
cs.step_2_p: We create a digital building model (BIM) to eliminate clashes and precisely plan costs.
cs.step_3_p: We complete documentation and obtain necessary administrative and technical permits.
cs.step_4_p: We execute earthworks, structural assembly and installations under strict engineering supervision.
cs.step_5_p: We conduct system tests, staff training and hand over the facility for use.
cs.faq_1_q: How long does it take to build a typical hall?
cs.faq_1_a: A standard 1000-2000 m² hall takes about 4-6 months, depending on the complexity of the installations.
cs.faq_2_q: Do you help with building permits?
cs.faq_2_a: Yes, as part of General Contracting, we take on the full administrative and legal process.
cs.faq_3_q: Do you build according to Eurocode standards?
cs.faq_3_a: All our designs and executions are strictly compliant with European structural design standards (Eurocodes).
cs.faq_4_q: What industrial installations do you perform?
cs.faq_4_a: We cover the full spectrum: HVAC, transformer stations, compressed air, sprinkler systems, and process automation.
cs.faq_5_a: We provide full 24/7 service care for key installation systems and periodic structural inspections.
cs.faq_6_a: It is an Austrian building system made of 100% solid wood: board layers connected with beech dowels, without glue or metal fasteners. We use it in premium residential and commercial buildings.
cs.contact_p: Our engineers will call you back within 24 hours to analyze your inquiry.
cs.form_privacy_label: I accept the privacy policy and technical contact.
cs.form_placeholder_message: Briefly describe the hall parameters or installation scope...
cs.form_success: Thank you. The inquiry has been forwarded to the estimating department.
cs.footer_brand_p:
Hall construction and industrial installations.
European standards, Polish execution.
cs.career_p: We are looking for engineers and specialists for whom precision is the foundation. We build a team based on technical knowledge and European standards.
cs.career_benefit_2: Work in BIM standard and modern IT tools
cs.career_benefit_3: Career path to Senior PM / Contract Director
cs.career_privacy_label: I consent to the processing of data for recruitment purposes.
cs.career_success: Thank you! Your application has been sent.

nl.holz_f1_p: Solid wood layers connected exclusively by dried beech dowels, which lock the structure permanently after absorbing ambient moisture.
nl.holz_f2_p: Diffusively open partitions naturally regulate indoor humidity and temperature all year round.
nl.holz_f3_p: Massive solid wood partitions achieve high fire resistance classes and excellent thermal accumulation.
nl.holz_f4_p: Every building binds carbon dioxide for decades — an ESG argument that every institutional investor values today.
nl.cases_lead: Projects completed by our team members within the structures of leading general contractors in Poland, Germany, and Norway.
nl.case_1_challenge_p: Comprehensive realization for a premium car dealer — parallel work of multiple trades and subcontractors on one site.
nl.case_1_solution_p: Coordination of subcontractors and in-house crews: steel structure, full electrical and sanitary installation, floor insulation, partitions, joinery, fire doors, tiling, earthworks, paving, screeds.
nl.case_1_result_p: Facility brought from shell state to handover — a scope identical to Velor's current general contracting offer.
nl.case_2_challenge_p: Track extension in an active port terminal — conflicts with existing infrastructure and ongoing operator logistics.
nl.case_2_solution_p: Demolition of existing infrastructure, earthworks and drainage, construction of new track layout coordinated with terminal operations.
nl.case_2_result_p: New track integrated with the existing layout without halting port operations.
nl.case_3_challenge_p: Realization of a complex glass-aluminum facade and high-end office fit-out in Norway's largest media hub.
nl.case_3_solution_p: Just-in-Time delivery management in dense urban areas and coordination of finishing works for TV broadcasters.
nl.case_3_result_p: Prestigious project serving as a quality benchmark in the Scandinavian market.
nl.p1_pl: Garwolin — complete electrical installation for a new KFC facility.
nl.p2_pl: Warsaw, Stromboli estate — replacement of 144 heat and water meters.
nl.p3_pl: Warsaw, Rose Estate — garage ventilation and fire protection renovation.
nl.p4_pl: Warsaw — garage lighting modernization: motion sensors, switchboards.
nl.p5_pl: Warsaw — kindergarten: classroom renovation and landscaping.
nl.p6_pl: Pruszków and Warsaw — residential: door portals and wood finishings.
nl.p7_pl: Mazowsze — single-family house: earthworks, reinforcement, formwork, concreting.
nl.p1_de: Sande k. Wilhelmshaven — PV farm: panel and fence assembly.
nl.p4_de: Magdeburg, Hasselbachplatz — tram track junction renovation.
nl.p5_de: Heeslingen — railway line renovation (4 km) with millimetre-tolerance track installation and traffic management.
nl.p1_no: Strusshamn, Kleppestø — waterproofing and plasterboard partitions.
nl.p2_no: Bergen, Lille Gartnerløkken — residential complex: prefab walls, wooden roof, facade.
nl.p3_no: Bergen, Steinkjellergaten — staircase and basement fire protection upgrade.
nl.p4_no: Bergen Region — greenhouse assembly 7.8 × 12.8 m from foundations to roof.
nl.step_1_p: We analyze operational needs and planning conditions to select optimal structural solutions.
nl.step_2_p: We create a digital building model (BIM) to eliminate clashes and precisely plan costs.
nl.step_3_p: We complete documentation and obtain necessary administrative and technical permits.
nl.step_4_p: We execute earthworks, structural assembly and installations under strict engineering supervision.
nl.step_5_p: We conduct system tests, staff training and hand over the facility for use.
nl.faq_1_q: How long does it take to build a typical hall?
nl.faq_1_a: A standard 1000-2000 m² hall takes about 4-6 months, depending on the complexity of the installations.
nl.faq_2_q: Do you help with building permits?
nl.faq_2_a: Yes, as part of General Contracting, we take on the full administrative and legal process.
nl.faq_3_q: Do you build according to Eurocode standards?
nl.faq_3_a: All our designs and executions are strictly compliant with European structural design standards (Eurocodes).
nl.faq_4_q: What industrial installations do you perform?
nl.faq_4_a: We cover the full spectrum: HVAC, transformer stations, compressed air, sprinkler systems, and process automation.
nl.faq_5_a: We provide full 24/7 service care for key installation systems and periodic structural inspections.
nl.faq_6_a: It is an Austrian building system made of 100% solid wood: board layers connected with beech dowels, without glue or metal fasteners. We use it in premium residential and commercial buildings.
nl.contact_p: Our engineers will call you back within 24 hours to analyze your inquiry.
nl.form_privacy_label: I accept the privacy policy and technical contact.
nl.form_placeholder_message: Briefly describe the hall parameters or installation scope...
nl.form_success: Thank you. The inquiry has been forwarded to the estimating department.
nl.footer_brand_p:
Hall construction and industrial installations.
European standards, Polish execution.
nl.career_p: We are looking for engineers and specialists for whom precision is the foundation. We build a team based on technical knowledge and European standards.
nl.career_benefit_2: Work in BIM standard and modern IT tools
nl.career_benefit_3: Career path to Senior PM / Contract Director

nl.career_success: Thank you! Your application has been sent.

no.page_title: Velor Construction | Industrial Halls & General Contracting
no.meta_description: Velor Construction — industrial halls, general contracting and Holz100 solid wood construction. European standards, Polish execution.
no.hero_h1:
Vi bygger med presisjon.
Europeisk standard.
Polsk utførelse.
no.hero_p: Totalentreprise for industrihaller, lagre og teknologiske installasjoner. Ingeniørpresisjon, kompromissløs kvalitet. Kommunikasjon: PL · EN · DE · FR · RU · UA
no.trust_1: ✓ Experience from projects in Germany, Norway and Poland
no.pillar_1_p: Experience from Scandinavian and German markets allows us to execute the most complex steel and concrete structures in accordance with Eurocodes.
no.pillar_2_p: We don't just build walls. We design and implement advanced industrial installations, HVAC, and Building Management Systems (BMS).
no.pillar_3_p: We take full responsibility for the construction process. From building permits to structural assembly and final acceptance.
no.service_1_p: Design and assembly of steel structures. Comprehensive construction of large-scale facilities, logistics and production centers.
no.service_2_p: Execution of advanced HVAC systems, high-power electrical installations, sanitary networks and fire protection systems.
no.service_3_p: Comprehensive project delivery in the 'Design & Build' system. Full technical consultancy and investment cost optimization.
no.service_4_p: Professional construction management, investor supervision, cost and schedule control using modern IT tools. Daily progress reports for the investor — a standard for every project.
no.service_5_p: We implement facilities in the Austrian Holz100 technology: walls made of 100% solid wood, connected with beech dowels — without glue, metal or building chemicals.
no.holz_lead: Alongside steel structures, we are developing a second pillar: solid wood construction in the Holz100 system — one of the purest wood technologies in Europe.
